name: workflow-orchestration-patterns
title: Workflow Orchestration Patterns
summary: Design durable workflows with Temporal for distributed systems. Covers workflow vs activity separation, saga patterns, state management, and determinism constraints. Use when building long-running processes, distributed transactions, or microservice orchestration.
